nasb.text: The descendants of Shecaniah were Shemaiah, and the sons of Shemaiah: Hattush, Igal, Bariah, Neariah and Shaphat, six.

esv.text: The son of Shecaniah: Shemaiah. And the sons of Shemaiah: Hattush, Igal, Bariah, Neariah, and Shaphat, six.

cnv.text: 示迦尼的子孫如下：示迦尼的兒子是示瑪雅；示瑪雅的兒子是哈突、以甲、巴利亞、尼利雅、沙法共六人。

ccb.text: 示迦尼的儿子是示玛雅，示玛雅的儿子是哈突、以甲、巴利亚、尼利雅、沙法。
